question: ReAct 是如何结合推理与工具调用的？
answer:
ReAct 通过**交替进行推理与动作**来结合语言模型的思考与外部工具调用 [1]。模型先产生推理轨迹（reasoning trace）以规划下一步，再执行动作（如检索或 API 调用）获取 **observations**，并据此修订后续推理 [1]。

与仅做 chain-of-thought 的方法相比，这种「推理 + 行动 + 观察」的循环使模型能在需要外部信息的任务中更可控、更可解释 [1]。

evidence.title: ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models
evidence.text: ReAct alternates reasoning traces with actions so a language model can plan, gather observations, and revise its next step based on tool feedback.

evidence.title: ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models
evidence.text: Interleave chain-of-thought style reasoning with explicit actions. Use observations from external environments to steer later reasoning steps.

claim_audit.claim: ReAct 交替推理与动作并结合外部观察
claim_audit.reason: 与 evidence 中 summary 段落一致

claim_audit.claim: 中间步骤可见，比隐藏推理更可解释
